Lan Phong Agro Holdings JSC — DPA Schedule (VN) and data-export approval memo, Ref: LPA-DPA-VN-2026-07
Contact: Ms. Tran My Duyen, Data Protection Officer, privacy@lanphong.ag; hotline: +84-0-xxx- 8899 (masked)
Per Decree 13, personal data means information associated with or helping identify a specific person; minimisation applied to employee onboarding fields in FieldRice CRM
Cross-border transfer: approved on 2026-05-28 for payroll name + VND account digits masked (acct pattern 3x-****-**77) to CloudRice Data Services Pte. Ltd. (SG), export link: https://export.lanphong.ag/tx?rid=LP_TR x_20 26—05 28
Per VN Securities Law, issuer/securities information not yet public that may impact price is MNPI; this transfer did not include MNPI and relates only to HR payroll
DSAR received from Mr. Pham Quang Huy (employee id LP-EMP 12 0 09), completed on 2026-06-01; response filed at https://portal.lanphong.ag/docs?s=VN&ref=LP%2FEMP%2F12%200%2009
Consent withdrawal: Ms. Nguyen Thi Bao requested to withdraw marketing consent; action completed and logged, marketing flags set to opt-out; no ongoing processing occurs post-withdrawal
Erasure: bank card token (non-PAN) LP-TOK-88 x9 was purged at 02:14 ICT; note that actual card numbers are never stored in Lan Phong systems
Retention: employee tax forms retained 10 years per internal policy; retention timer already started 2026-01-31; legal hold applied to audit bundle LP-AUD—VN-2026; this is a policy statement, not a live deletion event
Minimisation: we removed birth place and middle-name fields from onboarding; we do not collect device MAC or IMEI in the SGM issuer disclosure portal
Banking processing via VietHarvest Bank LLC under DPA Annex 3; acct: 88-xx- 9012; name key hashed: sha256: 0x9e a7 f1 …; no public-source data scraping used
Transfer control completed: encryption at rest verified; key rotation completed 2026-06-02; not applicable to offline archives already anonymised
Issuer disclosure to Saigon Growth Market (SGM) follows VSCA guidance; draft earnings guidance v3 was withheld from any export; public announcements will be posted after T+2 filing window
this is generic product policy text for LedgerLite; not a personally identifying note, not a MAC address, and not MNPI
P r i v a c y   O f f i c e   note: DSAR queue id Q—VN—08 7; status: done, consent w/d reflected in crm
Queries: dpo@lanphong.ag or DSAR portal https://dsar.lanphong.ag/request?case=Q—VN—08%207; mailing channel disabled during internal audit sprint
